title: Torn Coin Pouch
description: A jittery drifter shoves a bulging coin-pouch into your hands and bolts before you can refuse. The seams are split and weeping rust — coins already trickling out between your fingers.

options.text: Pocket it — coin is coin (+100 Gold)
options.result: You stuff the pouch away, a hundred richer. But the tear won't hold — with every step, a coin or two slips loose into the dust behind you.
You let the cursed thing fall. Whatever's wrong with it, it isn't your problem now.
